title: stelis gunningiana
intro: Stelis gunningiana, also known as the Gunning's Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Australia. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stelis gunningiana include reducing inflammation, fighting against infections, and protecting against cell damage, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions such as wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Stelis gunningiana is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, but more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
